places.name: Wat Phra Kaew
places.desc: The Temple of the Emerald Buddha — Thailand's most sacred Buddhist temple, built in 1782 within the Grand Palace grounds. Home to the revered Phra Kaeo Morakot jade statue.

events.name: Royal Ceremony
events.desc: A sacred royal ceremony held at the Temple of the Emerald Buddha. Witness traditional Thai rituals performed by Buddhist monks in full ceremonial attire.

events.name: Temple Art Tour
events.desc: Guided tour exploring the intricate murals, gilded spires, and symbolic artwork decorating every surface of Wat Phra Kaew. Led by expert art historians.

events.name: Photography Walk
events.desc: Early morning golden-hour photography session around the palace grounds. Small group of 8 max. Professional guide with photography tips included.

places.name: Chatuchak Market
places.desc: The world's largest weekend market with over 15,000 stalls spanning 35 acres. A labyrinth of vintage finds, local crafts, street food, and live plants.

events.name: Vintage Fashion Hunt
events.desc: Curated tour through the best vintage clothing stalls. Find retro gems, designer secondhand pieces, and unique Thai fashion. Tips on haggling included.
